name: Tournedos Coliseum
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the steaks with Creole meat seasoning.
2. Sauté the steaks in butter until cooked to just below the desired stage.
3. Remove the steaks and keep them warm.
4. Serve two tournedos per serving, one topped with Béarnaise sauce and the other with Marchand de Vin sauce.
5. Garnish with sliced blanched carrots and steamed pea pods.
